code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./DeviceList.css';import API_BASE_URL from'../config';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const DeviceList=()=>{const[devices,setDevices]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchDevices=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/products"));const data=await response.json();setDevices(data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching devices:',error);}};fetchDevices();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"device-list-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Device List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"awesome-button",children:"View All Devices"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:devices.map(device=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:device.name},device.id))})]});};export default DeviceList;
